message: Octopuses have three hearts.

Bananas are berries, but strawberries are not.
The Eiffel Tower grows slightly taller in summer.
A day on Venus is longer than its year.
Trees communicate through underground fungal networks.
Saturn would float in water if a large enough ocean existed.
Some turtles can breathe through specialized tissues while underwater.
